source_intake_record.raw_question_text: <image>The diameters of $\odot A, \odot B,$ and $\odot C$ are 10, 30 and 10 units, respectively. Find BX if $\overline{A Z} \cong \overline{C W}$ and $C W=2$.

the target is a derived segment length rather than a directly stated value, suggesting at least two inference/calculation steps
